学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026 in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with a slight rise, belonging to the highest level among specialized sports institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus management incidents such as the volleyball league home court controversy; ranked 18th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 264万+, high short video exposure, reflecting relatively high attention from applicants; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Sports Science is an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), top in the country; majors such as Sports Rehabilitation, Sports Human Science, and Intelligent Sports Engineering are highly aligned with the university's advantageous sports disciplines, possessing unique competitiveness.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward movement of the 2025 ranking to 23383, the substantial expansion of the 2026 plan (+50%), and high Douyin attention, the expansion makes the ranking number significantly larger (easier to enter), but the 2025 ranking is already at a low point in recent years, and popular majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology have strong appeal, partially offsetting the expansion effect; the expected minimum ranking is about 30598, with a range of 30098–31098.

As the top institution among domestic sports colleges, its medical category (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) major relies on the university's profound accumulation in sports science, with distinctive disciplinary characteristics and industry recognition, which strongly attracts candidates interested in sports rehabilitation.
